name: Ivalua Procurement API
what_it_does: Ivalua REST API for enterprise source-to-pay and procurement management platform. Enables AI agents to manage supplier data, purchase orders, contracts, sourcing events, and spend analytics across the full procurement lifecycle. Ivalua is positioned as a Gartner leader for source-to-pay suites covering supplier management, sourcing, procurement, and AP automation.
use_cases: Managing supplier onboarding and qualification from procurement automation agents
Processing purchase requisitions and orders from AP workflow agents
Analyzing spend data and category management from procurement analytics agents
Integrating procurement data with ERP and finance systems from integration agents
not_for: Simple AP automation without source-to-pay integration
Non-enterprise companies without dedicated procurement teams
best_when: An enterprise procurement team using Ivalua wants AI agents to automate supplier management, purchasing workflows, and spend analysis across the source-to-pay lifecycle.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Procurement operations involve financial commitments and supplier relationships. Contract and PO automation errors have real financial and legal consequences.

auth.notes: Ivalua uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Tokens are short-lived. Enterprise API access requires customer portal setup and IT coordination.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual contracts
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing per module and user volume; negotiated contracts
pricing.notes: Enterprise source-to-pay pricing. French company with global deployment. API access included with enterprise subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits; varies by deployment

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Procurement operations involve financial commitments and legal contracts
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API requiring customer portal setup
Limited public API documentation — enterprise support engagement required
Complex procurement data model covering suppliers, contracts, catalogs, POs
French company — EU-first data residency; GDPR native
API access configuration typically requires IT and Ivalua implementation team
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Full procurement and supplier data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. French company — EU-first. Enterprise-only with limited public docs.

security_score_components.security_notes: Procurement financial data and supplier contracts. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. French company — EU-first. Enterprise-only.
